name: financial_services_near_miss_event_stonehaven_lib_eq
premise: Correspondent-bank reconciliation has diverged across two time zones, and nostro balances no longer reconcile to the penny. In Financial Services, the situation tagged internally around financial services near miss event stonehaven lib eq has converged with local pressure in the Stonehaven corridor. That label is not a full explanation, but it is how crews, counsel, and comms are indexing the case file right now. Two executives have pre-committed to opposite remedies in side channels; whichever memo lands first will box everyone in. Middle management filtered an escalation; the executive on point is hearing some details for the first time on this bridge. Regulators or auditors are en route with a ninety-minute ETA; the first documented response will anchor every later question. The organization’s past incidents make liberty feel morally loud today, while equality is the value that quietly erodes if you always choose expediency.

agents.name: Priya Kowalski
agents.identity: I am Priya Kowalski, the incident lead whose name will appear on the after-action report in Financial Services. I own the signature line that turns a recommendation into an irreversible operational fact for the next phase.
agents.goal: I need a path that does not treat equality as disposable collateral every time liberty spikes in urgency, but I also cannot pretend we have luxury time we do not have.

agents.name: Ravi Rahman
agents.identity: I am Ravi Rahman, the counsel or integrity officer watching downstream liability in Financial Services. I am tracking who gets protected last if we choose speed, silence, or a narrow definition of success.
agents.goal: I want explicit guardrails so liberty cannot become a blank check that quietly vaporizes equality in the paperwork afterward.

choices: I will redirect resources to the smallest cohort first where harm is most concentrated, documenting tradeoffs openly—privileging fairness dimensions of equality.
I will optimize for aggregate harm reduction across the whole population immediately—privileging the utilitarian reading of liberty even where distribution gets rough.
forced_choice.call_to_action: Silence will be interpreted as a decision by everyone outside this room. Priya Kowalski must choose under liberty versus equality. What does Priya Kowalski do?
